MANUFACTURED_HOME_DETAIL.ManufacturedHomeValuationCommentText: The subject is a manufactured home that was built to HUD Code and structurally designed and constructed to accommodate site-built features. Specifically, for the subject, the attached garage and front porch which were constructed at the time of installation.

ROOM_DETAIL.RoomQualityDescription: All appliances are Energy Star® Rated, countertops are solid surface.
ROOM_DETAIL.RoomQualitySummaryDescription: Energy Star appliances and wood cabinets

STRUCTURE_ANALYSIS_DETAIL.EffectiveAgeDescription: The subject has an actual age of 2 years and was manufactured, and installed on site, in 2020. Effective age is estimated at 1-5 years.

STRUCTURE_COMPONENT_DETAIL.ImprovementComponentQualityDescription: The subject has a crawl space set on a poured concrete perimeter footer.

STRUCTURE_COMPONENT_DETAIL.ImprovementComponentConditionDescription: The roof was installed at manufacturing and installation/set-up 2 years ago and is in like new condition.

STRUCTURE_DETAIL.StructureValuationCommentText: Subject meets requirements for CHOICEHome® and MH Advantage and features a poured concrete perimeter foundation and skirting, Low E thermal windows, a 30-year roof, aluminum siding and synthetic stone accents.

MARKET_DETAIL.MarketBoundariesDescription: Main Road to the North, East Main Road to the East, West Main Road to the West, and Southern Highway to the South.
MARKET_DETAIL.MarketInventorySearchParameterDescriptio: Detached, 1 story, manufactured, modular, and site built dwellings with no basements located within Market Boundaries and sold from 6/1/21 - 3/1/22.

MARKET_TREND.PriceTrendsAnalysisDescription: Market data reflects the manufactured and modular home market in the subject's area. The data indicates the market is stable to slightly increasing with sales activity of 1 to 2 sales per month which is typical for this rural area. The Smokey Bear Gazette is a local print media that reports non-MLS home sales and listings. 2 active listings and 3 sales were reported for the 9 months prior to the effective date of the appraisal and are included in the data reported above.

PARCEL_SUMMARY_DETAIL.ParcelsLegalDescription: Section 23 Township 3S Range 3E Tax Lot 00700 and 00700B

SITE_INFLUENCE_DETAIL.SiteInfluenceDescription: The subject is located within 1/2 mile of a regional park with a lake, hiking and horse back riding trails, playgrounds, and picnic areas.

SITE_ZONING_DETAIL.SiteZoningClassificationDescription: Zoning allows one dwelling minimum per 12,000 sq. ft. including manufactured and modular housing.

ROOM_DETAIL.RoomQualitySummaryDescription: Energy Star appliances and wood cabinets
Builder Grade Quality Appliances and Cabinets
Energy Star appliances and wood cabinets
Energy Star appliances and wood cabinets

COST_APPROACH_DETAIL.CostAnalysisCommentDescription: Cost of all structures are based off a lump sum estimate per square foot or per cubic foot of all components of the structure including their foundations. The comparative unit method is used to derive a cost estimate in terms of dollars per unit of area, or volume, based on known cost of similar structures that are adjusted for time, and physical differences. The cost estimate is then applied to the total building area. The total depreciation for the dwelling includes the attached garage. Depreciated costs were calculated on an economic age-life basis at 4% per year for the dwelling and 6% per year for the garage. Depreciated site improvements include public utility hook-ups, driveway, sidewalks, patio, and porch.
COST_APPROACH_DETAIL.SiteEstimatedValueCommentDescription: The land sale comparables were selected from sales of unimproved sites suitable for manufactured homes located within the subject's market area. Comparables #1 ($2.53 per square foot) and #2 ($2.86 per square foot) received most weight due to comparability in size and location within a mile of recreational areas that are similar to the park that is a half mile from the subject. Comparable #3 ($2.00 per square foot) received least weight as it does not have access to public utilities and is located within a half of mile of a landfill facility. The subject's land sale in 2019 (comparable #4) was also taken into consideration. The subject's site was valued at $2.70 per square foot.

SITE_IMPROVEMENTS_AS_IS_COST.SiteImprovementDescription: Utility Connections, Driveway, Patio, and Porch

SALES_COMPARISON_APPROACH_DETAIL.SalesComparisonCommentDescription: The comparables selected represent the best available market activity in the prior 6 months. Comparables 1, 3, and 4 are CHOICEHomes or MHAdvantage. Comparable #1 is similar to the subject in age, quality and condition. However, was given less weight due to the water view, superior lot size and living area. The view is a full view of a non-navigable pond with access limited to the properties that have direct waterfront. Comparable #2 was given less weight as it does not have the finishes and upgrades that the subject and other comparables have, has not been updated, and has less living area as compared to the subject. Comparable #3 was given most weight as it is similar to the subject in age, quality and condition and is the most comparable in living area. Comparable #4 was also given most consideration as it represents the most recent market activity, is similar in living area and most similar in quality, condition, features and amenities. Comp #4 receives a location adjustment as it is located within a mile of a large lake with public access, boat ramp, and rentable dock space and boat storage.

VALUATION_COMMENTARY.ValuationCommentText: Additional commentary can be added here, if needed by Appraiser.

The subject porch was site built at the time of installation and set-up. The dwelling was designed and constructed to accommodate the porch and garage. The patio is free standing and not attached to the dwelling.

The subject is legally permissible and physically possible under the current zoning, 1-5 MH Residential, which allows for manufactured and modular homes on a minimum 12,000 square foot lot. Analysis indicates that the subject is in a market area of similar sized lots that are improved with comparable manufactured and modular homes demonstrating market acceptance. Sales prices of vacant and improved properties support the conclusion that the subject represents the highest and best use as improved. The property is outside the city limits and all types of single family homes are appropriate.
The overall quality and condition ratings are reflective of the interior and exterior quality and condition ratings.
The prior transfer of the subject was a land sale. Purchase of the manufactured home was separate from this transaction. The manufactured home was installed after the purchase of the land.
There were no prior sales or transfers of the comparable sales within the last 12 months.
The subject features an attached 2 car garage with electric garage door opener.

VALUATION_RECONCILIATION_DETAIL.ValuationReconciliationSummaryCommentDes: Utilize this subsection for additional commentary as required by USPAP.
